title: Create: Sophisticated Backpacks Compat
description: A compatibility mod that integrates Sophisticated Backpacks with Create
body:
This mod adds a selection of **Create** machine recipes for **Sophisticated Backpacks** items, letting you automate key components inside your Create factories. Only carefully chosen recipes are replaced, so the core Sophisticated Backpacks progression and gameplay remain intact.

This mod only needs to be installed on the server, but for the singleplayer experience it has to be added on the client as well.

If you have more recipe suggestions, write it down into the comments!
